title: pagiantha corymbosa
intro: Pagiantha corymbosa, also known as the Coral Honeysuckle, is a non-woody, twining vine native to tropical forests in Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Pagiantha corymbosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to aid in the relief of various ailments and promote overall well-being.
